response.justification: Bogdan has extensive experience in software development with a strong background in C++ from early in his career (e.g., National Instruments), but his recent roles have primarily focused on JavaScript/TypeScript, Node.js, and Dlang, with limited exposure to modern C++ development, STL, or secure engineering practices required for this role. His lack of recent C++ work and no clear evidence of IEC 62443 or industrial cybersecurity experience are significant concerns.
strengths: Strong foundation in C++ from earlier career stages (e.g., National Instruments role)
Proven expertise in software architecture, design patterns, and agile methodologies
Diverse technical background with experience in high-performance systems and multi-threaded applications
concerns: Limited recent experience with C++/STL and modern C++ development practices
No clear evidence of work with IEC 62443 cybersecurity standards or secure development lifecycle (SDL) practices
Primary focus in recent roles has been on JavaScript/TypeScript and Dlang, not aligned with the role's core requirements

key_factors.factor: Experience with high-performance, networked, multi-threaded systems in C++
